questions.question: Describe the basic operation of a Blum Blum Shub Generator, including the key generation process and the use of quadratic residues.
questions.hint: Key generation involves finding suitable quadratic residues.

questions.question: What is the main advantage of using a Blum Blum Shub Generator for generating pseudorandom numbers, and how does this relate to the properties of modular arithmetic?
questions.hint: Consider the role of the modulus in Blum Blum Shub.

questions.question: An implementation of a Blum Blum Shub Generator uses a modulus of 323. Explain why this choice of modulus is suitable for generating pseudorandom numbers using this generator.
questions.hint: Consider the factorization of the modulus.
